critical_vulnerabilities.description: External .transfer() call inside a for loop without reentrancy guard
critical_vulnerabilities.impact: Funds can be drained through reentrancy attack or DoS via revert
exploit_steps: 1. Attacker creates malicious contract with fallback that reverts or re-enters
2. Attacker gets added as beneficiary in one of the agreements
3. When releaseAgreements() is called, attacker's fallback triggers
4. If re-entering: drain funds before state update
5. If reverting: DoS the entire batch release
critical_vulnerabilities.recommendation: Add nonReentrant modifier, use Checks-Effects-Interactions pattern

critical_vulnerabilities.description: ETH transfer operations without verified access control
critical_vulnerabilities.recommendation: Verify access control modifiers on all ETH-handling functions

critical_vulnerabilities.description: ETH transfer operations without verified access control

high_severity_summary.note: Many may be intentional admin-only functions - requires manual review
